Run M0 ignition detection for the current season

Source: R/pipeline_runtime.R
run_m0_detection.Rd

Detects epidemic ignition from the current season data using pre-trained M0 thresholds. Optionally overrides the automatic estimate with a manual week. Returns the resolved ignition week and the full run_ignition_weekly() output for downstream M1 alignment.

Usage

run_m0_detection(
  kit,
  current_data,
  manual_ign_week = NA_integer_,
  verbose = TRUE
)

run_m0(kit, current_data, ...)

Arguments

kit

A kit list returned by load_prospective_kit().

current_data

Data frame for the current season. Must contain weekF, y, N, neg, p.

manual_ign_week

Integer or NA_integer_. When set, overrides the M0 automatic ignition estimate with a known value.

verbose

Logical. Emit progress messages (default TRUE).

...

Additional arguments forwarded by the run_m0() alias.

Value

A list with:

ign_out

Full output of run_ignition_weekly(), with iWeek_hat_locked and ign_week_locked updated if overridden.

iWeek_locked

Resolved ignition week (NA if not detected).

overridden

Logical; TRUE if the manual override was applied.
